Package org.patternfly.style

Interface Modifiers.Disabled<E extends Element,B extends TypedBuilder<E,B>>

All Superinterfaces:
IsElement<E>, TypedBuilder<E,B>
All Known Implementing Classes:
Button, Card, Checkbox, Dropdown, FormControl, FormSelect, FormSelectOption, FormSelectOptionGroup, InputGroup, InputGroupItem, MenuItem, MenuToggle, MenuToggleAction, MenuToggleCheckbox, Radio, Slider, Switch, Tab, TabContent, TextArea, TextInput, TextInputGroup, TextInputGroupMain
Enclosing interface:
Modifiers
public static interface Modifiers.Disabled<E extends Element,B extends TypedBuilder<E,B>> extends TypedBuilder<E,B>, IsElement<E>
